prompt: In this CivKings game, the city production popup draws a progress bar showing how close the current build is to finishing. When a city has accumulated more production than the item costs (carryover/overflow), the bar overflows past its track and the percentage shown climbs above 100% instead of capping at a full bar. Find where the production queue display computes the build progress and make an over-funded item render as a completely full bar at 100%.
